Scenario: Verify Admin Report shows Migration summary for all users
Steps:
1. Log in as Admin
2. Go to Report > Admin Report
3. Select Migration Backup Report
ExpectedResult: Migration summary shown for all users and sessions

Scenario: Verify Admin Report shows Backup summary for all users
Steps: 1. Open Admin Report > Migration Backup Report
ExpectedResult: Backup summary listed with source type target type and status

Scenario: Verify Admin Report filters by date range
Steps:
1. Open Migration Backup Report
2. Apply date range filter
ExpectedResult: Only records within selected range displayed

Scenario: Verify Admin Report filters by user
Steps:
1. Open Migration Backup Report
2. Select specific user from filter
ExpectedResult: Only that user's records shown

Scenario: Verify Admin Report filters by source type (BIM 360 / Egnyte)
Steps: 1. Apply source filter = BIM 360
ExpectedResult: Only BIM 360 source records shown

Scenario: Verify Admin Report filters by target type (Amazon S3)
Steps: 1. Apply target filter = Amazon S3
ExpectedResult: Only Amazon S3 target records shown

Scenario: Verify Admin Report filters by target type (File System)
Steps: 1. Apply target filter = File System
ExpectedResult: Only File System target records shown

Scenario: Verify Admin Report filters by target type (S3 Compatible)
Steps: 1. Apply target filter = S3 Compatible
ExpectedResult: Only S3 Compatible target records shown

Scenario: Verify Admin Report filters by target type (Azure Blob Storage)
Steps: 1. Apply target filter = Azure Blob Storage
ExpectedResult: Only Azure Blob Storage target records shown

Scenario: Verify Admin Report shows correct success and failure counts
Steps: 1. Open Migration Backup Report
ExpectedResult: Success count and failure count match actual run data

Scenario: Verify Admin Report shows file count and data size per run
Steps:
1. Open Migration Backup Report
2. Check a specific run row
ExpectedResult: File count and total size shown accurately

Scenario: Verify Admin Report shows duration of each migration/backup run
Steps:
1. Open report
2. Check duration column
ExpectedResult: Duration shown for each completed run

Scenario: Verify Admin Report can be exported to Excel
Steps:
1. Open Migration Backup Report
2. Click Export > Excel
ExpectedResult: Excel file downloaded with full report data

Scenario: Verify Admin Report can be exported to CSV
Steps:
1. Open Migration Backup Report
2. Click Export > CSV
ExpectedResult: CSV file downloaded with full report data

Scenario: Verify BIM 360 → Amazon S3 backup report record correct
Steps:
1. Complete a BIM 360 → Amazon S3 backup
2. Open Admin Report
ExpectedResult: Record appears with source=BIM 360 target=Amazon S3

Scenario: Verify BIM 360 → File System backup report record correct
Steps:
1. Complete a BIM 360 → File System backup
2. Open Admin Report
ExpectedResult: Record appears with source=BIM 360 target=File System

Scenario: Verify BIM 360 → S3 Compatible backup report record correct
Steps:
1. Complete a BIM 360 → S3 Compatible backup
2. Open Admin Report
ExpectedResult: Record appears with source=BIM 360 target=S3 Compatible

Scenario: Verify BIM 360 → Azure Blob Storage backup report record correct

2. Open Admin Report
ExpectedResult: Record appears with source=BIM 360 target=Azure Blob Storage

ExpectedResult: Record appears with source=Egnyte target=Amazon S3

Scenario: Verify Admin can view detailed downloaded report for a specific run
Steps:
1. Open Admin Report > Downloaded Report Details
2. Select a completed run
ExpectedResult: Detailed report opens with all file-level results

Scenario: Verify downloaded report details show per-file status (success/failed)
Steps: 1. Open a detailed report
ExpectedResult: Each file row shows transfer status

Scenario: Verify downloaded report details show error reason for failed files
Steps: 1. Open a detailed report with failures
ExpectedResult: Failed file rows include error message or reason

Scenario: Verify downloaded report details include file path and size
Steps: 1. Open detailed report
ExpectedResult: File path and size columns populated for each entry

Scenario: Verify downloaded report details can be filtered by status (success/failed)
Steps:
1. Open detailed report
2. Apply status filter
ExpectedResult: Only matching rows shown

Scenario: Verify detailed report can be exported to Excel
Steps:
1. Open detailed report
2. Click Export > Excel
ExpectedResult: Excel file with file-level detail downloaded

Scenario: Verify detailed report shows total files processed and total size
Steps: 1. Check summary row at bottom of detailed report
ExpectedResult: Totals row shows file count and cumulative size

Scenario: Verify detailed report shows run start time and end time
Steps: 1. Open detailed report header
ExpectedResult: Start and end timestamps shown

Scenario: Verify navigation between summary and detail views works
Steps:
1. Click a run row in summary to open detail
2. Click Back
ExpectedResult: Returns to summary view without data loss
